calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.
Giulio Accornero for American Research Bureau.

Mr. Accornero stated that everything is in his declaration and that an incredible amount of work was done. The Final Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-31-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet M. Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator; Julio Accornero for American Research Bureau.

Mr. Accornero informed the Court that the first five heirs were located with usual effort by American Research Bureau, but that the last two required substantial extra effort. He explained that one of the decedent's grandfathers was married three times, and it took six months to trace all the lines and locate the two remaining heirs, thereby justifying the higher assignment rate as to them. The Court inquired why and effort was required to locate heir Barbara Grandinetti, who had been identified in the Public Administrator's amendment to the petition for probate. Mr. Accornero stated that he was not personally familiar with the steps taken to locate the heirs, and requested a continuance to provide a declaration describing the efforts made. Ms. Boesenecker stated that she was unaware there were any issues regarding the heirs, and joined in the request for a continuance to explore the matter and make a supplemental submission. The matter was continued to January 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Continued To Oct-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Petitioner.

The Court informed Counsel that he needs to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Weinkauf stated that he is aware of it, that he tried to get a continuance and that he has not been able to the information that is being requested. Mr. Weinkauf also stated that they have contacted that one Niece several times, that he was told by her this morning that she was contacted by an heirship company and that she would not provide the name of the company. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
